calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-18-2016 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2015 Set For Trial On Apr-11-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-11-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mikayla Kellogg, Esq. of Toscano Kellogg & Van Aken, LLP. (888-235-8582 ext. 102) for Plaintiff/Opposing party Elizabeth Padilla.
No other Appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling:

DEFENDANT SHEREE DELORIO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges facts regarding standing and illegal prong of the B&P 17200 cause of action. Order is signed in Open Court. (see scanned order for details) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-11-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mikayla Kellogg, Esq. of Toscano Kellogg & Van Aken, LLP. (888-235-8582 ext. 102) for Plaintiff/Opposing party Elizaeth Padilla.
No other Appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SHEREE DELORIO's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED. Request for punitive damages in conjunction with tort and statutory violation causes of action are sufficiently alleged.
Order is signed in open court. (see scanned order for details) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
